perturbation.original_text: Donated amounts will be allocated and dispersed to the Northern California Chapter beginning on the first full quarter [three (3) month period] of the Agreement and continue on a quarterly basis thereafter for the term of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Donated amounts will be allocated and dispersed to the Northern California Chapter beginning on the first full quarter [three (3) month period] of the Agreement and continue on a monthly basis thereafter for the term of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by stating that the donations will be dispersed on a 'monthly basis' instead of the original 'quarterly basis'. This creates uncertainty and an in-text contradiction in Section Four regarding the frequency of donation disbursements.
perturbation.contradicted_text: A *donation of $0.05 per Unit sold of Licensed Products within the Contract Territory payable to the **NFL Alumni Northern California Chapter. Donated amounts will be allocated and dispersed to the Northern California Chapter beginning on the first full quarter [three (3) month period] of the Agreement and continue on a monthly basis thereafter for the term of this Agreement. Where the following per Unit conversion shall apply for the term of this Agreement: a. (1) Bottle of BlackMP LivingWater = 1 Unit b. (1) 4oz bottle of BlackMPConcentrate = 30 Units c. (1) Bottle of Zezel ProbioticWater = 1 Unit d. (1) Bottle of Zayin Sports Water = 1 Unit e. (1) Bottle Gridiron MVP™ Water= 1 Unit f. (1) Bottle Gridiron CBD H20 Probiotics™ Water = 1 Unit g. (1) 4oz bottle of Gridiron MVP™Concentrate = 30 Units _____________ * The NFLA-NC will donate 15% of the above described proceeds to the NFLA. ** The Company will provide to the NFLA-NC upon request the most recent quarterly sales report of the Company's Licensed Products.
perturbation.justification: The original text specified quarterly disbursements, which aligns with the phrase 'first full quarter [three (3) month period]'. The changed text introduces a contradiction by stating that disbursements will be made on a 'monthly basis' while the contradicted text originally contained language to indicate that the donation amounts would be dispensed quarterly ('first full quarter'). However, the changed text alters this, making the contradicted text now specify disbursements would be on a monthly basis ('monthly basis thereafter'). This now creates an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Other products of the Company may be added to the list of Licensed Products during the Contract Period by written amendment to this Agreement. All amendments to this Agreement must be signed by all parties to this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Other products of the Company may be added to the list of Licensed Products during the Contract Period at the Company's sole discretion. All amendments to this Agreement must be signed by the Company, unless adding products, in which case no signature is required.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction. Originally, adding products to the 'Licensed Products' list requires a written amendment signed by all parties. The changed text states that the company can add products at its 'sole discretion' and no signature is required in those cases. This contradicts the previous statement that all amendments must be signed by all parties, leading to uncertainty about the process for adding licensed products.
perturbation.contradicted_text: F. "Licensed Products" shall mean BlackMP Living Water, BlackMP Concentrate, Zezel Probiotic Water, Zayin Sports Water, Gridiron CBD H2O Probiotics™ Water, Gridiron MVP™ and Gridiron MVP™ Concentrate using the Pro Football Legends Logo on the Licensed Products' affixed labels, hang-tags or packaging. Other products of the Company may be added to the list of Licensed Products during the Contract Period at the Company's sole discretion. All amendments to this Agreement must be signed by the Company, unless adding products, in which case no signature is required.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text required all amendments, including adding products, to be signed by all parties. The changed text explicitly states that adding products can be done at the company's sole discretion without requiring signatures, which contradicts the general requirement for all amendments to be signed. This aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition, creating conflicting obligations and uncertainty about the amendment process.

perturbation.original_text: The parties have executed this Agreement on November 22nd, 2017.
perturbation.changed_text: The parties intend to execute this Agreement, with the effective date retroactive to November 22nd, 2017.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction. The original states the agreement 'has' been executed on November 22nd. The modified version states that the parties 'intend' to execute it, but the agreement is 'retroactive' to that date. This contradicts the established fact of the execution and throws into question the agreement's current state of validity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The parties intend to execute this Agreement, with the effective date retroactive to November 22nd, 2017. Food For Athletes, Inc. / Gridiron BioNutrients™ By: /s/ Darren Long Darren Long - CEO The National Football League Alumni, Inc. By: /s/ Elvis Gooden Elvis Gooden - President NFL Alumni - Northern California Chapter By: /s/ Eric Price Eric Price - President Endorsement Agreement Addendum I Page 2 of 2 Source: GRIDIRON BIONUTRIENTS, INC., 8-K, 12/6/2017
perturbation.justification: The original text states the agreement 'has' been executed, while the changed text states the parties 'intend' to execute it, but retroactively. This creates a contradiction regarding the agreement's validity. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, highlighting the inherent contradiction introduced by altering the agreement from an executed state to an intended future execution with a retroactive effect. As per the explanation, this throws into question the agreement's current state of validity.
